name: glob
description: Find files by glob pattern. Default root is session workdir. Supports `**` recursion. Results sorted by modification time (newest first).

pattern.description: Glob pattern. Filename-only patterns (no `/`) match recursively at any depth; path-aware patterns like `src/**/*.py` are matched relative to the search root.

path.description: Directory to search in. Relative paths resolve against the session workdir. Omit to use the workdir.
